trSearchPageDynamicDescription: Quickly check the {{page}} timetable, fares, and delay info from {{startStation}} to {{endStation}}. We provide service alerts, historical search, and booking guidance for a smoother commute or trip.
thsrSearchPageDynamicDescription: Quickly check the {{page}} timetable and fares from {{startStation}} to {{endStation}}. We provide service alerts, historical search, free seat car details, and real-time seat booking guidance for a smoother commute or trip.
tymcSearchPageDynamicDescription: Quickly check the {{page}} timetable and fares from {{startStation}} to {{endStation}}. We provide service alerts and historical search for a seamless commute or airport transfer.
subTitle: Quick and Easy Multi-Rail Schedule Lookup.
webDescription: Easily check Taiwan Railways, High-Speed Rail, and Taoyuan Airport MRT schedules. We provide fares, delays, transfers, booking redirection, and historical search for a smoother commute or trip.
thsrPageDescription: Quickly check Taiwan High Speed Rail schedules. We provide fare info, service announcements, historical search, free seat car details, and real-time seat booking guidance for a smoother commute or trip.
tymcPageDescription: Easily check Taoyuan Airport MRT schedules. We provide fare info, service announcements, and historical search for a seamless commute or airport transfer.
featuresPageDescription: Explore key features, user guides, and learn how to install the website as an app for a faster and more convenient browsing experience.
updatesPageDescription: Stay updated with the latest announcements, version releases, and new features of the website.
privacyPageDescription: Learn how this website collects, uses, and protects your personal information to safeguard your privacy.
termsPageDescription: Read the terms of service and usage guidelines to understand your rights and responsibilities when using this website.
announcementTrTransferV1: Starting today, we're launching the 'TRA Transfer' Beta lookup, which provides basic transfer route combinations for Taiwan Railway. Since these routes are computed by our system, they may not exactly match the official TRA recommended transfer routes — thank you for your understanding.
We will continue to observe real usage and refine these route combinations. If you can't find the train you want, please click the button below to report.
announcementTrOrderV1: The 'Booking' feature in this system is actually a 'Booking Redirection' or 'Booking Forwarding' service that helps you quickly navigate to the official TRA or THSR websites with the selected train information pre-filled. On mobile devices, the system defaults to launching the '台鐵 e 訂通' or 'T-EX 行動購票' apps. If you prefer web-based booking, you can disable 'Mobile Use APP Booking' in the System Settings page.

Please note that due to data source limitations, the seat availability information displayed on this site may differ slightly from actual records. All final results are subject to the official railway systems. Thank you for your understanding.
sameStationMsg: 'Departure Station' and 'Arrival Station' cannot be the same.
datetimeNotAllowMsg: The date is empty or out of range, so it has been reset to today. Showing results for {{date}}.
sameQueryMsg: You are querying too fast! Please try again later.
favoriteRequiresLogin: Saving favorite routes requires login. Sign in now?
favoriteLimitReached: You can save up to 5 favorite routes. Please remove one first.
arrivalTimeAccuracyMsg: (Please allow 0-3 minutes variance in arrival time.)
noTrainDataTitleMsg: No train information found! Possible reasons:
noTrainInThisTimeMsg: The departure time set is too late and there are no more scheduled trips.
noTrainStopBetweenStationsMsg: There are no trains stopping between these two stations.
noTrainDataTryTransferMsg: There may be no direct trains between these stations; try "Transfer" instead.
noTrainDataDueToApiErrorMsg: System anomaly, please try again later or notify the system administrator.
noTransferDataTitleMsg: No transfer plans found! Possible reasons:
noSuitableTransferRouteMsg: There may be no suitable transfer routes between these stations.
noTransferInThisTimeMsg: The departure time set is too late; no connecting trains remain today.
reportTransferIssuePrefix: This may be a system error. Click the button to report.
reportConfirmMsg: Please select the issue you ran into:
reportReasonMissing: Some valid transfer options seem to be missing
reportReasonExtra: The list has duplicate or redundant options
reportReasonHub: The transfer stations feel out of the way or odd
reportTransferSuccessMsg: Thanks for your feedback! We'll review this as soon as possible.
errorFallbackTitle: Something went wrong while rendering the page
errorFallbackDescription: Please refresh the page. If the issue persists, contact the administrator.
disclaimerMsg: The information provided on this site is for reference only. Please refer to the official announcements for accurate details.
feedbackDescription: This system is independently developed by an individual and aims to provide a simple and fast timetable lookup service for various railways. It is not an official platform. If you have any questions or suggestions regarding the system, feel free to click the button below to submit feedback.
pwaIntro: App-like usage experience for enhanced user experience!
pwaIOSStep1: Tap the 'Share' button in the browser.
pwaStep2: Find and Tap 'Add to Home Screen'.
adMsg: Taiwan Railways/High-Speed Rail data is now being charged. We use ads to reduce some of the burden, and we ask for your understanding.
pageOnlyTwMsg: This page is temporarily unavailable in languages other than Traditional Chinese.
orderFailMsg: Booking redirectfailed, please try again later.
businessSeatAlertMsg: Only business seats are available. Do you want to proceed with booking?
typhoonAlertMsg: Due to the impact of the typhoon, please refer to the latest announcements from Taiwan Railways and High-Speed Rail for the latest updates on train operations and suspensions.
eTicketAlertMsg: Do not board with electronic tickets (such as EasyCard/iPASS) or periodic tickets.
generalTimetableAlertMsg: The timetable for this date is based on the 'General Timetable'. Please refer to the official daily announcements for actual train operations.
hidePopularRoutesConfirmMsg:
Hide Popular Routes?
You can re-enable it in Settings.
premiumPreviewBenefit: Ad-free experience with a paid membership
membershipExpiredMsg: Your premium membership has expired and benefits like ad-free are paused. Renew to restore them.
loginSyncBannerDescription: Sign in to automatically sync the settings below to your other devices.
logoutConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to log out?
settingsPageDescription: Manage your preferences for TrainTime, including train settings, display mode, and language.
loginServerErrorMsg: Login failed. The server is temporarily unable to process the request. Please try again later.
sessionExpiredMsg: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again to access member features.

premium.seoDescription: Become a JSY premium member to remove ads and support an independent developer in maintaining and building new features. One-time plans for 1 / 6 / 12 months — the longer you buy, the lower the monthly price.
premium.heading: Premium Plans
premium.supportMessage: JSY TrainTime launched in 2020, built and maintained by an independent developer. If you become a premium member, you'll enjoy an ad-free experience and help support the service going further.
premium.consentWaiveCoolingOff: I have read and agree to the <0>Purchase Notice</0>, and understand that as an immediately usable digital service, the 7-day cooling-off period does not apply.
premium.consentRequired: Please agree to the purchase notice before buying.
premium.checkoutFailed: Something went wrong creating the payment. Please try again later, or email us if it persists.
premium.termsOneTime: One-time purchase: a single payment buys membership for the chosen duration. This is not a subscription — it does not auto-renew or auto-charge; renew by purchasing again.
premium.termsExpiry: Expiry: counted in calendar months from the purchase. Buying again before expiry stacks the new duration onto your current expiry date.
premium.termsPayment: Payment: via ECPay credit card (Apple Pay supported). Only credit cards issued in Taiwan are supported, priced in TWD.
premium.termsScope: Scope: premium benefits apply only to this service (traintime.jsy.tw) and are non-transferable.
premium.termsNoCoolingOff: Cooling-off period: as a digital service available for immediate use, the 7-day cooling-off period does not apply under Taiwan's Consumer Protection Act. You will confirm your consent before checkout.
premium.termsRefund: Refunds: as an immediately usable digital service, no refunds are offered after activation. For duplicate charges or system errors, please email us and we'll verify and assist.
premium.termsInvoice: Invoice: the service's revenue is currently below the threshold for issuing invoices, so no invoice is issued at this time.
premium.contactText: Questions about plans or payment? Email us:

paymentResult.processingMsg: We're confirming your payment; your membership will update automatically once confirmed. If it hasn't updated shortly, tap refresh below.
paymentResult.successMsg: Thank you for your support! Your premium membership has been updated.
paymentResult.failedMsg: This payment did not succeed or was cancelled, and your membership is unchanged. If you were actually charged, please email us.

errors.INVALID_INPUT: Invalid query parameters. Please check all fields and try again.
errors.DATE_OUT_OF_RANGE: The selected date is out of the supported range. Please pick another date.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You're not signed in. Please sign in and try again.
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: User account not found. Please contact the administrator.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.TDX_UPSTREAM_ERROR: The upstream data source (MOTC TDX) is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.TDX_TIMEOUT: The data source (MOTC TDX) timed out. Please try again later.
errors.TDX_RATE_LIMITED: We're handling a high volume of requests. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.BFF_UPSTREAM_ERROR: The service is temporarily unreachable. Please try again later.
errors.DB_UNAVAILABLE: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
errors.NETWORK_OFFLINE: You appear to be offline. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.UNKNOWN: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
